[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot of a mobile app or game interface shows multiple blue “1 Hari Premium” claim buttons and a comment/reply list with badges and level indicators.

The main focus is the center area of the screen, which contains several wide blue rectangular buttons with rounded corners labeled “1 Hari Premium” and a white “Klaim” button on the right. Above and below these claim bars, there are lines of text indicating “Replies,” “Reply,” and entries that include names, checkmarks, and level numbers.

The setting is a dark-themed user interface on a handheld device screen, viewed from a straight-on perspective. At the very top, there is a status bar with the time “11.41” on the left and small icons on the right, including a cloud-like symbol, a moon shape, a Wi‑Fi symbol, and a battery indicator showing “57%”.

Visual details include black and dark gray backgrounds, with bright blue highlight bars for the premium claim offers. Each premium bar has a small white crown icon on the left, then the text “1 Hari Premium” and a subtext line beginning with “Tersisa” followed by a number and “dari” another number. The right side of each bar has a white rounded pill containing the blue word “Klaim.” Between and around the premium bars, there are purple and green pill-shaped labels and small circular profile-like icons.

Visible text includes:

Practically, the image shows a dark UI screen with multiple “1 Hari Premium” reward/offer bars and “Klaim” buttons. It also shows a replies/comment section with timestamps, usernames, and level tags.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
